emotion_and_tone: High energy, competitive, playful, creator-focused, immersive

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing for hero and content, but dense 'Control Room' grid for the generation dashboard and battle screens.

grid_modes.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6. Sidebars take 3 cols, main viewer takes 9 cols.
grid_modes.gallery: Columns break mason-style or bento grid with asymmetric spans (col-span-4 vs col-span-8).
grid_modes.battle: Split screen 50/50 layout on desktop, stacked on mobile.

surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Used for sticky headers, floating tools, and dialogs. Class: `backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl`.
surface_strategies.bento_cards: Flat background (`bg-zinc-900`), 1px subtle border (`border-zinc-800`), slight inner shadow. Hover states lift (`-translate-y-1`) with a glowing border.
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: Solid electric color (`bg-[#CCFF00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide`). Hover creates inner white glow and outer shadow.
surface_strategies.inputs: Dark filled (`bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 focus:border-[#CCFF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#CCFF00]`).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up slightly (1.02) and add colored drop-shadow glow (e.g., `hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(204,255,0,0.5)]`).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use spring-like transitions for a playful gaming feel. `transition-all duration-300 ease-out`.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items and gallery models.

components_strategy.3d_viewer: React Three Fiber (R3F) for main product viewing. Use `<Environment preset="city" />` and soft ambient lighting. Transparent background to blend with dark UI.
components_strategy.feed: TikTok-style vertical snap scroll (`snap-y snap-mandatory`) for mobile. Bento grid for desktop explore.
components_strategy.battle_mode: Tinder-style swipe cards (Framer Motion) or side-by-side click to vote.
components_strategy.icons: Use `@phosphor-icons/react` with `weight="duotone"` for a high-end gamer look.
components_strategy.toast: Sonner with a dark theme and neon borders.

image_urls.description: Abstract 3D colorful shape, perfect for a floating background element behind the text.
3D miniature character to use as a UGC generation example.
3D character in red suit, good for showcasing clothing/UGC.
Glowing neon controller for gaming aesthetic in battle mode or challenges section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei react-fast-marquee sonner`
Apply `bg-[#09090B] text-white` to the root body.
Implement the landing page with a massive `Unbounded` font headline and a floating 3D element alongside the abstract image background.
The header must use glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10`).

Implement the AI Generation dashboard using a 'Control Room' grid: Left sidebar for inputs/chat (Prompt enhancer), large center area for the React Three Fiber 3D viewer, and right sidebar for variations/recoloring.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dropdowns, Tabs, Inputs) but heavily customize them to match the dark/neon theme.
For the community gallery, implement a grid view (bento style) and mention the vertical scrolling TikTok mode.
All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="generate-btn"`).
Avoid using any standard purple/teal AI gradients. Stick to the `#CCFF00`, `#FF0055`, and `#00F0FF` neon accents on pure dark backgrounds.
